sentiment.reasoning: Securing a large contract with a leading platform is a significant positive event, indicating strong demand and future revenue.

headlines.headline: Crevex Labs reports record quarterly revenue, up 7% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue with a 7% year-over-year increase indicates strong financial performance and positive market reception.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
